content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "在咖啡店點餐",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "你好，請問要喝什麼？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, qǐng wèn yào hē shénme?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, qing3 wen4 yao4 he1 shen2me?",
          "translation_en": "Hello, what would you like to drink?",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 무엇을 드시겠어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "我要一杯小杯的熱拿鐵，半糖，去冰。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ yào yī bēi xiǎo bēi de rè nátiě, bàn táng, qù bīng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 yao4 yi1 bei1 xiao3 bei1 de re4 na2tie3, ban4 tang2, qu4 bing1.",
          "translation_en": "I'd like a small hot latte, half sugar, no ice.",
          "translation_ko": "작은 컵 따뜻한 라떼 하나, 반당, 얼음 빼주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "好的，內用還是外帶？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, nèi yòng háishì wài dài?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, nei4 yong4 haishi4 wai4 dai4?",
          "translation_en": "Okay, for here or to go?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 드시고 가시나요, 아니면 포장하시나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "內用，謝謝。",
          "pinyin": "Nèi yòng, xièxiè.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Nei4 yong4, xie4xie4.",
          "translation_en": "For here, thank you.",
          "translation_ko": "드시고 갈게요, 감사합니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "總共八十塊，可以刷卡嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Zǒnggòng bā shí kuài, kěyǐ shuākǎ ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zong3gong4 ba1 shi2 kuai4, ke3yi3 shua1ka3 ma?",
          "translation_en": "That's 80 dollars total. Can you pay by card?",
          "translation_ko": "총 80위안입니다. 카드 결제 가능하신가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "可以，我刷卡。",
          "pinyin": "Kěyǐ, wǒ shuākǎ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ke3yi3, wo3 shua1ka3.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, I'll pay by card.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 카드로 할게요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "請在這裡刷卡，謝謝。等一下幫您送過去。",
          "pinyin": "Qǐng zài zhèlǐ shuākǎ, xièxiè. Děng yīxià bāng nín sòng guòqù.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Qing3 zai4 zhe4li3 shua1ka3, xie4xie4. Deng3 yi1xia4 bang1 nin2 song4 guo4qu4.",
          "translation_en": "Please swipe your card here, thank you. I'll bring it to you in a moment.",
          "translation_ko": "여기서 카드를 긁어주세요, 감사합니다. 잠시 후에 가져다 드리겠습니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What did the customer order?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 무엇을 주문했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Small hot latte, half sugar, no ice", "Large iced latte, normal sugar", "Medium hot latte, less sugar"],
          "options_ko": ["작은 따뜻한 라떼, 반당, 얼음 빼기", "큰 아이스 라떼, 일반 당도", "중간 따뜻한 라떼, 당도 적게"],
          "correct_index": 0
        },
        {
          "question_en": "How did the customer pay?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 어떻게 결제했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Cash", "Credit card", "Electronic payment"],
          "options_ko": ["현금", "신용카드", "전자결제"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each line after hearing it, focusing on tone and rhythm. Try to match the speaker's intonation.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Pretend you are the customer. Order a medium iced latte with less sugar, for here, and pay with cash. Say it in Chinese."
    },
    {
      "title": "問路到捷運站",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "不好意思，請問捷運站怎麼走？",
          "pinyin": "Bù hǎo yìsi, qǐng wèn jiéyùn zhàn zěnme zǒu?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4 hao3 yi4si, qing3 wen4 jie2yun4 zhan4 zen3me zou3?",
          "translation_en": "Excuse me, how do I get to the MRT station?",
          "translation_ko": "실례합니다, 지하철역은 어떻게 가나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "從這裡直走，到路口左轉，再走兩分鐘就到了。",
          "pinyin": "Cóng zhèlǐ zhí zǒu, dào lùkǒu zuǒ zhuǎn, zài zǒu liǎng fēnzhōng jiù dào le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Cong2 zhe4li3 zhi2 zou3, dao4 lu4kou3 zuo3 zhuan3, zai4 zou3 liang3 fen1zhong1 jiu4 dao4 le.",
          "translation_en": "Go straight from here, turn left at the intersection, and walk for two more minutes. You'll be there.",
          "translation_ko": "여기서 직진하시다가 교차로에서 좌회전하시고, 2분 더 걸으시면 도착합니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "左轉？是紅綠燈那裡嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Zuǒ zhuǎn? Shì hónglǜdēng nàlǐ ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zuo3 zhuan3? Shi4 hong2lv4deng1 na4li3 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Turn left? At the traffic light over there?",
          "translation_ko": "좌회전요? 신호등 있는 그곳인가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "對，就是那個路口。捷運站入口在右邊。",
          "pinyin": "Duì, jiù shì nàge lùkǒu. Jiéyùn zhàn rùkǒu zài yòu biān.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Dui4, jiu4 shi4 na4ge lu4kou3. Jie2yun4 zhan4 ru4kou3 zai4 you4 bian1.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, that intersection. The MRT station entrance is on the right.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 바로 그 교차로입니다. 지하철역 입구는 오른쪽에 있어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "好的，謝謝你！",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, xièxiè nǐ!",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, xie4xie4 ni3!",
          "translation_en": "Okay, thank you!",
          "translation_ko": "네, 감사합니다!"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "不客氣，小心路滑。",
          "pinyin": "Bú kèqì, xiǎoxīn lù huá.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu2 ke4qi4, xiao3xin1 lu4 hua2.",
          "translation_en": "You're welcome. Be careful, the road is slippery.",
          "translation_ko": "천만에요. 길이 미끄러우니 조심하세요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Where is the MRT station entrance?",
          "question_ko": "지하철역 입구는 어디에 있습니까?",
          "options_en": ["On the left after turning left", "On the right after turning left", "Straight ahead"],
          "options_ko": ["좌회전 후 왼쪽", "좌회전 후 오른쪽", "직진"],
          "correct_index": 1
        },
        {
          "question_en": "What did B warn A about?",
          "question_ko": "B가 A에게 무엇을 주의하라고 했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Traffic", "Slippery road", "Construction"],
          "options_ko": ["교통", "미끄러운 길", "공사"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each line, paying attention to the direction words (直走, 左轉, 右邊). Practice the tones carefully.",
      "free_response_prompt": "You are at a park. Ask someone how to get to the nearest convenience store. They tell you to go straight, turn right at the second intersection, and it's on the left. Say this in Chinese."
    },
    {
      "title": "計畫週末見面",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "這個週末你有空嗎？我們一起去看電影好不好？",
          "pinyin": "Zhège zhōumò nǐ yǒu kòng ma? Wǒmen yīqǐ qù kàn diànyǐng hǎo bù hǎo?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zhe4ge zhou1mo4 ni3 you3 kong4 ma? Wo3men yi1qi3 qu4 kan4 dian4ying3 hao3 bu4 hao3?",
          "translation_en": "Are you free this weekend? How about we go see a movie together?",
          "translation_ko": "이번 주말에 시간 있으세요? 같이 영화 보러 갈까요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好啊！星期六下午我有空。你想看什麼電影？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo a! Xīngqīliù xiàwǔ wǒ yǒu kòng. Nǐ xiǎng kàn shénme diànyǐng?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 a! Xing1qi1liu4 xia4wu3 wo3 you3 kong4. Ni3 xiang3 kan4 shen2me dian4ying3?",
          "translation_en": "Sure! I'm free Saturday afternoon. What movie do you want to see?",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요! 토요일 오후에 시간 있어요. 무슨 영화 보고 싶으세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我聽說有一部新電影很好看，是關於台灣小吃的。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ tīngshuō yǒu yī bù xīn diànyǐng hěn hǎokàn, shì guānyú Táiwān xiǎochī de.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 ting1shuo1 you3 yi1 bu4 xin1 dian4ying3 hen3 hao3kan4, shi4 guan1yu2 Tai2wan1 xiao3chi1 de.",
          "translation_en": "I heard there's a new movie that's really good, about Taiwanese street food.",
          "translation_ko": "새 영화 하나가 정말 재미있다고 들었어요, 대만 길거리 음식에 관한 거예요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "聽起來不錯！我們可以先去吃午餐，再看電影。",
          "pinyin": "Tīng qǐlai bùcuò! Wǒmen kěyǐ xiān qù chī wǔcān, zài kàn diànyǐng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ting1 qi3lai bu2cuo4! Wo3men ke3yi3 xian1 qu4 chi1 wu3can1, zai4 kan4 dian4ying3.",
          "translation_en": "Sounds great! We can go eat lunch first, then watch the movie.",
          "translation_ko": "좋네요! 먼저 점심 먹고, 영화 보러 가요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "好，那我們約星期六中午十二點在餐廳門口見面，好嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, nà wǒmen yuē xīngqīliù zhōngwǔ shí'èr diǎn zài cāntīng ménkǒu jiànmiàn, hǎo ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3, na4 wo3men yue1 xing1qi1liu4 zhong1wu3 shi2'er4 dian3 zai4 can1ting1 men2kou3 jian4mian4, hao3 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Okay, then let's meet at the restaurant entrance at noon on Saturday, okay?",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요, 그럼 토요일 낮 12시에 식당 입구에서 만나요, 괜찮죠?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "沒問題，到時候見！",
          "pinyin": "Méi wèntí, dào shíhou jiàn!",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 wen4ti2, dao4 shi2hou jian4!",
          "translation_en": "No problem, see you then!",
          "translation_ko": "문제없어요, 그때 봐요!"
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What day and time do they plan to meet?",
          "question_ko": "그들은 언제 만나기로 했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Saturday at noon", "Sunday at noon", "Saturday at 2 PM"],
          "options_ko": ["토요일 낮 12시", "일요일 낮 12시", "토요일 오후 2시"],
          "correct_index": 0
        },
        {
          "question_en": "What will they do first?",
          "question_ko": "그들은 무엇을 먼저 할 예정입니까?",
          "options_en": ["Watch a movie", "Eat lunch", "Go shopping"],
          "options_ko": ["영화 보기", "점심 먹기", "쇼핑하기"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each line, focusing on the flow of making plans (先...再..., 約...見面). Practice the tones for time expressions.",
      "free_response_prompt": "You want to invite a friend to go to a night market this weekend. Suggest Saturday evening, and say you can eat and walk around. Ask if they are free. Say this in Chinese."
    }
  ]
}
